headline: Lululemon Athletica (LULU) Stock After 47% Slide Is The Market Overreacting?
summary: If you are wondering whether lululemon athletica stock is starting to look interesting after a tough run, the current setup makes valuation the key question to focus on next. The share price last closed at US$111.77, with returns declining 5.9% over the past week, 11.8% over the past month, 47.0% year to date, and 50.9% over the past year, as well as 70.1% over three years and 69.3% over five years. Recent headlines around lululemon athletica have centred on its position in the premium...
